recommendations.title: Objectified
recommendations.overview: A feature-length documentary about our complex relationship with manufactured objects and, by extension, the people who design them.

recommendations.title: Electric Boogaloo: The Wild, Untold Story of Cannon Films
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the rise and fall of the Cannon Film Group, the legendary independent film company helmed by Israeli cousins Menahem Golan and Yoram Globus.

recommendations.title: Metal: A Headbanger's Journey
recommendations.overview: The film discusses the traits and originators of some of metal's many subgenres, including the New Wave of British Heavy Metal, power metal, Nu metal, glam metal, thrash metal, black metal, and death metal. Dunn uses a family-tree-type flowchart to d
recommendations.director: Jessica Joy Wise, Scot McFadyen, Sam Dunn

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: Pina
recommendations.overview: Pina is a feature-length dance film in 3D with the ensemble of the Tanztheater Wuppertal Pina Bausch, featuring the unique and inspiring art of the great German choreographer, who died in the summer of 2009.

recommendations.title: The Captains
recommendations.overview: The Captains is a feature-length documentary film written and directed by William Shatner. The film follows Shatner as he interviews the other actors who have portrayed starship captains in the Star Trek franchise.

recommendations.title: Man with a Movie Camera
recommendations.overview: A cameraman wanders around with a camera slung over his shoulder, documenting urban life with dazzling inventiveness.

recommendations.title: Indie Game: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Follows the dramatic journeys of video game developers as they create and release their games to the world. It's about making video games, but at its core, it's about the creative process, and exposing yourself through your work.

recommendations.title: The Jazz Singer
recommendations.overview: A young Jewish man is torn between tradition and individuality when his old-fashioned family objects to his career as a jazz singer. This is the first full length feature film to use synchronized sound, and is the original film musical.

recommendations.title: BTS World Tour: Love Yourself in Seoul
recommendations.overview: Shot at the Olympic Stadium in Seoul during the BTS World Tour ‘Love Yourself’ to celebrate the seven members of the global boyband and their unprecedented international phenomenon.
